name: IEEE TALE 2026
full_name: International Conference on Teaching, Assessment, and Learning for Engineers
host: IEEE Education Society + IEEE Thailand Section

online_presentation.notes: Past editions hybrid; 2026 CFP/FAQ does not explicitly state virtual option. Pre-submission email inquiry required.

allowed_servers: non-profit preprint servers approved by PSPB
preprint_policy.official_quote: Authors who have submitted or plan to submit their articles to IEEE may post their preprints in the following locations: arXiv.org, TechRxiv.org, or any not-for-profit preprint server approved by the Publication Services and Products Board (PSPB), Author's employer's website or institutional repository, Author's personal website.

theme_2026: AI-Augmented Learning: Redefining the Future of Engineering & Technology Education
tracks: AI for Education (Generative AI, Adaptive Learning, Learning Analytics, Ethical AI)
candidate_papers: P1 extension (Big Five x online learning, Japanese cohort, Learning Analytics framing)
P5 simulation (Big Five generative agent prediction)
blocking_issues: Virtual presentation availability unconfirmed - requires direct inquiry
P3 metaanalysis cannot be used as-is due to Research Square preprint
action_required_today: Send virtual-presentation inquiry email; resolve preprint server question for any candidate
